name: 2026-old-farmers-almanac
description: The 2026 Old Farmer's Almanac — America's oldest continuously published periodical, offering weather forecasts, gardening advice, astronomy, recipes, and useful tips.
useCase: Plan your year around weather forecasts, gardening calendars, astronomical events, and seasonal living tips.
knownRisks: Time-sensitive content — weather forecasts and astronomical data for 2026 only
Weather accuracy not guaranteed — use alongside modern forecasts
US/Canada focused — gardening and weather data specific to North America
